sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109042" key="u(porga/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπ-οργάζω</orth>, <sense id="n109042.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">knead a little</tr_> (sens. obsc.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">84</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
